This plant is part of the Ranunculastrum genus, which is a group of flowering plants that are commonly found in mountainous regions. Within the family Ranunculaceae, Ranunculastrum albonaevum is classified as a member of the order Ranunculales. Further classification includes its placement within the clade of flowering plants (Angiosperms) and the larger group of seed plants (Spermatophytes).
